chunks.text: On a winter night, my family sits in front of the stove
It is important for all students to read a little every day.
It is not easy for my brother to learn new words.
But he keeps trying, and he is getting strong.
It is still difficult for my sister to read long English sentences.
Even so, she tries a little every night.
For our family, this quiet reading time is necessary now.
“ Is it hard for you to speak English?
“ Yes, but it is very important for me to try,” I answered firmly.
